title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 04 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 04 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 04 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.06 % today, the main contract closed at 821.The traders' willingness to ship is less.The steel mills are not active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 865 yuan/mt. PBF at Tangshan port deal 885-892 yuan/mt.
